name: mm_dsa_qknorm_rope_prefill
goal: Optimize solution.py against SGLang's minimax_qknorm_rope baseline for DSA fused Gemma-QK-norm + partial RoPE prefill; beat the full sweep and match SGLang output within the declared tolerance.
